ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.
M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: During the course of the past week did you have times in which you were thinking deeply or thinking about many things?
During the course of the past week did you find yourself sometimes failing to concentrate?
During the course of the past week did you lose your temper or get annoyed over trivial matters?
During the course of the past week did you have nightmares or bad dreams?
During the course of the past week did you sometimes see or hear things which others could not see or hear?
During the course of the past week was your stomach aching?
During the course of the past week were you frightened by trivial things?
During the course of the past week did you sometimes fail to sleep or lose sleep?
During the course of the past week were there moments when you felt life was so tough that you cried or wanted to cry?
During the course of the past week did you feel run down (tired)?
During the course of the past week did you at times feel like committing suicide?
During the course of the past week were you generally unhappy with things you were doing each day?
During the course of the past week was your work lagging behind?
During the course of the past week did you feel you had problems in deciding what to do?
